DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
example extensions link metadata rich-text status usecase
component pattern style theme token
accessibility anatomy api artifact-reference best-practice design-specifications guideline interaction principle purpose scale state variant

DSDS Extensions Definition

Vendor-specific extensions for DSDS documents. Provides an open object for tool-specific metadata that does not belong in the core schema. Keys MUST use vendor-specific namespaces.

Source: common/extensions.schema.json

extensions

Vendor-specific extensions. Keys MUST use vendor-specific namespaces (reverse domain name notation recommended). Tools that do not recognize an extension MUST preserve it. Extension data SHOULD NOT duplicate information available in core schema fields.

object

Example

{
  "com.figma": {
    "componentId": "abc123def456",
    "variableCollectionId": "VariableCollectionId:1234:5678"
  },
  "com.storybook": {
    "storyId": "components-button--primary"
  },
  "com.internal": {
    "teamOwner": "design-systems",
    "jiraProject": "DS",
    "lastAuditDate": "2024-11-15"
  }
}
↑ Back to top

Design System Documentation Standard (DSDS) 0.1 — Draft Specification
